title: Canadian law firms still hire around intake and admin workload before they automate it
summary: A public research note on how smaller Canadian law firms often add admin headcount before showing visible workflow automation.
contextLine: Updated from EnrichAnything market scans · live snapshot from March 23, 2026
dataNote: Built from the latest published EnrichAnything market scan.
citationText: Based on EnrichAnything's latest scan of matching firms, 100% already include an explicit gap signal and 95% include a timing note.
